mapper.insert: INSERT INTO photography_activity ( title, description, start_time, end_time, location, max_participants, current_participants, photographer_id, status, require_audit, latitude, longitude, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{maxParticipants}, #{currentParticipants}, #{photographerId}, #{status}, #{requireAudit}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, location, max_participants AS maxParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, photographer_id AS photographerId, status, require_audit AS requireAudit, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM photography_activity ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, title, description, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, location, max_participants AS maxParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, photographer_id AS photographerId, status, require_audit AS requireAudit, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM photography_activity WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE photography_activity SET status = 1 WHERE status = 0 AND start_time <= #{now}
UPDATE photography_activity SET status = 2 WHERE status = 1 AND end_time <= #{now}
